title: liparis japonica
intro: Liparis japonica, also known as the Japanese orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Liparis japonica has been found to possess medicinal properties that aid in reducing fever, inflammation, and pain. Its health benefits include being used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as promoting digestion and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and dried roots, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
